summary: Comprehensive end-to-end button testing of Travel OMS multi-tenant SaaS platform. Tested ALL sidebar navigation routes, Dashboard buttons, Orders page buttons, Order Detail page buttons, Agencies page, Hotels page, Coupons page, and modal dialogs. Found 16 pages with WHITE SCREEN due to React component errors. Core functionality (Login, Dashboard, Orders, Finance, CRM, Operations, System Management, Pilot) mostly works.

minor.issue: 400 responses logged for webhook/telemetry endpoints - non-blocking

ui_bugs.issue: WHITE SCREEN - 'setUsers' and 'setError' are not defined

passed_tests: ✅ Login page - '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' button visible
✅ Login page - 'Ana sayfaya dön' button visible
✅ Dashboard - 'Demo verisi oluştur' button opens modal with seed options
✅ Orders page - Status filter dropdown present
✅ Orders page - Date range filter present
✅ Orders page - 'Yeni Sipariş' button opens modal
✅ Order Detail - Financial summary (Finansal Özet) section present
✅ Order Detail - Ledger section (Ledger Kayıtları) present
✅ Order Detail - Activity Timeline (Olay Zaman Çizelgesi) present
✅ All Finance routes load correctly (13 pages)
✅ All CRM routes load correctly (5 pages)
✅ All Operations routes load correctly (4 pages)
✅ System Management routes load correctly (except 3 broken)
✅ Data Import routes load correctly (2 pages)
action_items: FIX HIGH PRIORITY: AdminAgencyModulesPage.jsx - Remove 'setLoading' calls on lines 26 and 140, use loading from useQuery hook instead
FIX HIGH PRIORITY: AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx - Define 'loadTenantDirectory' function or replace with queryClient.invalidateQueries call
FIX HIGH PRIORITY: SettingsPage.jsx - Add useState hooks for 'users', 'error', and 'setUsers', 'setError'
FIX: AdminPerfDashboardPage - Check React error boundary, likely undefined state variable
FIX: AdminB2BDashboardPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminCampaignsPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminPartnersPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminB2BMarketplacePage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminCatalogPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminCatalogHotelsPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminMatchesPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminExportsPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminSystemBackupsPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminSystemIncidentsPage - Check React error boundary
FIX: AdminRunbookPage - Check React error boundary
critical_code_review_comments: AdminAgencyModulesPage.jsx uses setLoading/setModules but they are not defined via useState - lines 26, 29, 30, 36, 44, 46, 140, 145
AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx references loadTenantDirectory (line 609, 688) but the function is never defined
SettingsPage.jsx uses setUsers/setError/users/error variables but never declares them with useState (lines 201, 206, 208, 211, 213, 304, 328, 335)

success_rate.frontend: 74% (60+ routes passed, 16 routes with white screens)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 16 pages have WHITE SCREEN issues due to React component errors. The main fixes needed are: 1) AdminAgencyModulesPage.jsx - replace setLoading calls with proper state management using useQuery's loading state, 2) AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx - define loadTenantDirectory function, 3) SettingsPage.jsx - add useState hooks for users and error variables. All other pages (Dashboard, Orders, Finance, CRM, Operations, most System pages) work correctly. The 'Yeni Sipariş' modal opens correctly with all form fields working.

white_screen_pages_summary.common_error_pattern: React component error - undefined variables or functions
